name: Indoor Golf
about: IndoorGolf.com is a provider of indoor golf and multi-sport simulation technology, offering a range of commercial and consumer products. The company has been in operation since 1995, providing simulators that have become increasingly realistic over time. Their offerings include commercial simulators, launch monitors, video analysis systems, and custom putting greens, with a focus on accurate hardware and comprehensive software features. The company partners with major brands to provide solutions for both commercial venues and personal use at home or in the office.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide range of premium and multi-sport simulator hardware options from leading brands
Comprehensive software features including 36 play modes and customizable environmental conditions
Solutions for various settings, from commercial centers to home and office practice spaces

food_and_drink.notes: No information available about on-site food services

simulator_hardware.notes: Offers a range of simulators with tracking system using sonic and optical sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators, as they provide the technology and simulation environment but not the equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no specific information about bringing outside food and drinks, so it's best to contact the venue directly to confirm their policy on outside items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the simulator model and number of players, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours for a standard round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue offers multi-sport simulators that could be appealing to families, but there is no specific information about dedicated children's areas or junior programs.
